prompt: Generate an information graphic: a combination chart using the bar and line graph structure from image 1, augmented with data points shown as variable-sized bubbles as seen in image 2, on a shared axis layout.
prompt_refined: Generate an information graphic. Create a combination chart that integrates the bar and line graph structure from image 1, including its dual Y-axes and shared X-axis for time series data. Overlay this primary chart with additional data points represented as variable-sized bubbles, adopting the visual style and appearance of the bubbles in image 2. Ensure these bubbles are plotted within the same overall coordinate system, utilizing the shared X-axis and an appropriate Y-axis from the combined chart.
objects: Variable-sized bubbles (with visual style of Image 2)
